title: Resources
text:
## Others
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> NetBox: Infrastructure tracking](https://netbox.nrp-nautilus.io)

## Kubernetes operators (CRDs)

### Databases

- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [PostgreSQL (zalan.do)](/documentation/userdocs/running/postgres)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Elasticsearch](https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/cloud-on-k8s/current/k8s-elasticsearch-specification.html)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Prometheus](https://prometheus-operator.dev) (users are allowed to create [`ServiceMonitors`](https://prometheus-operator.dev/docs/api-reference/api/#monitoring.coreos.com/v1.ServiceMonitor))
- <Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> [ClickHouse](/documentation/userdocs/running/clickhouse)
- <Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> [Nebula graph](https://www.nebula-graph.io)
- <Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> [ScyllaDB](https://operator.docs.scylladb.com/stable/resources/scyllaclusters/index.html)

### Compute

- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Ray](/documentation/userdocs/running/ray-cluster)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Dask](/documentation/userdocs/running/dask-cluster)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Kubeflow](/documentation/userdocs/running/kubeflow)

### Others

- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Cert-manager](/documentation/userdocs/running/ingress#auto-renewing-the-certificate)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Sealed secrets](https://github.com/bitnami-labs/sealed-secrets?tab=readme-ov-file#usage)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Multus](https://github.com/k8snetworkplumbingwg/multus-cni)
- <Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> [Admiralty federation](https://admiralty.io)
- <Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> [Clabernetes Containerlab](https://containerlab.dev/manual/topo-def-file/)
- <Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> [keda.sh autoscaling](https://keda.sh)
